title: Update your Cove
when: A new version of Lucid Cove is out, or you pulled changes to cove-core.
description: Pull the latest cove-core and rebuild your Cove. Database migrations apply automatically on restart. Run from your Cove's folder (the one with docker-compose.yml).

steps.label: Update cove-core
steps.note: Use your cove-core path if it lives elsewhere.

steps.label: Rebuild + restart
steps.note: Run from your Cove folder. Migrations apply automatically on boot.
